mapper.select: SELECT p.place_id, p.name AS place_name, p.is_closed, p.first_image, m.name AS owner_name FROM PLACE p JOIN member m ON m.member_id = p.member_id WHERE p.member_id = #{bizMemberId} LIMIT 1

SELECT r.reservation_id, r.visitor_name, r.phone, r.visit_date, r.headcount, r.status, r.created_at, p.name AS place_name, pay.amount, pay.payment_status FROM RESERVATION r JOIN PLACE p ON p.place_id = r.place_id LEFT JOIN PAYMENT pay ON pay.reservation_id = r.reservation_id WHERE r.place_id = #{placeId} AND r.visit_date = CURDATE() ORDER BY r.reservation_id

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(r.visit_date) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(r.visit_date) = MONTH(CURDATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS monthly_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = '대기중' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pending_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.visit_date = CURDATE() AND r.status = '확정' THEN r.headcount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS today_visitors, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = '취소요청중' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS cancel_request_count FROM RESERVATION r WHERE r.place_id = #{placeId}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(month_series.month_start, '%c월') AS month_label, COALESCE(agg.booking_count, 0) AS booking_count, COALESCE(agg.revenue, 0) AS revenue FROM ( SELECT DATE_SUB(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL n MONTH) AS month_start FROM (SELECT 0 n UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5) n_list ) month_series LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(r.visit_date, '%Y-%m-01') AS month_start, COUNT(*) AS booking_count, SUM(COALESCE(pay.amount, 0)) AS revenue FROM RESERVATION r LEFT JOIN PAYMENT pay ON pay.reservation_id = r.reservation_id WHERE r.place_id = #{placeId} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(r.visit_date, '%Y-%m-01') ) agg ON agg.month_start = month_series.month_start ORDER BY month_series.month_start

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = '대기중' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pending_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = '확정' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS confirmed_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = '완료' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS done_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = '취소' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS cancelled_count FROM RESERVATION r JOIN PLACE p ON p.place_id = r.place_id WHERE r.place_id = #{placeId} AND p.member_id = #{bizMemberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PLACE_IMAGE (place_id, image_url, sort_order) VALUES (#{placeId}, #{imageUrl}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT p.place_id, p.name, p.place_type, p.region_id, r.region_name, p.address, p.description, p.is_closed FROM PLACE p LEFT JOIN REGION r ON r.region_id = p.region_id WHERE p.member_id = #{bizMemberId} LIMIT 1
SELECT image_url FROM PLACE_IMAGE WHERE place_id = #{placeId} ORDER BY sort_order
